name: How long does it take to **fix AI invisibility** for my Phoenix firm?

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to **fix AI invisibility** for my Phoenix firm?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**3-12 months, depending on securing third-party recognitions and data consistency.** Immediate audits reveal gaps, but directories update annually.[1][3] PR reinforcement accelerates pattern recognition.[2]

**Key factors:**
- Recognition cycle times
- AI model retraining
- PR propagation
- Website optimizations

**Start with an AI audit today and pursue peer reviews now.** Monitor monthly.[1] **Patience yields compounding visibility.**
